method: Every row is grounded in a directly-observed filesystem listing, file read, or quote from an upstream-of-record JSON. Negative-presence claims (e.g. 'not installed') are backed by a recursive name search returning zero matches.

wo_quotes.section_4_hardware_mapping_quote: Models present: SDXL base, IP-Adapter FaceID, kontext turnaround LoRA. To add (gated install): FLUX.1 Kontext, Wan 2.2 I2V, LTX-Video, HunyuanVideo, kohya for LoRA training.
wo_quotes.section_3_6_core_five_quote: Plus finish the in-flight core five (Specification/Verification/Architecture/Builder/Router) — recover from the saved build prompts at X:\Automations\apex\spawned_prompts\AGEN-* and Codex review transcripts (verbatim recovery, not invention), then commit + PR this time (the May gap was a missing commit step, not a deletion).
wo_quotes.section_0_authority_quote: Authority: `apex_governance/PLAN_CRITERIA.md` §0 hierarchy, `CLAUDE_CODEX_DOCTRINE` (Codex = reviewer-of-record, no Claude self-review), R20 (no guessing / preserve detail).
wo_quotes.section_s1_quote: Character Bible (per character). Structured doc: visual identity (face, hair, default outfit, palette from brand tokens), personality/behaviour cues, do/don't. Source descriptors from X:\characters (galinda, MJ sessions, casting_pool.html) — extract verbatim, do not rewrite. Naming ANIM_<Brand>_<Character>_bible_v<n>.md.
wo_quotes.section_s2_quote: Model / turnaround sheet. FLUX.1 Kontext + the kontext-turnaround-sheet LoRA you already have (front / 3-4 / side / back on clean white). Gold-standard reference. De-dupe the 3 extra LoRA copies first. Naming ANIM_<Brand>_<Character>_turnaround_v<n>.png.
wo_quotes.section_s6_quote: Image-to-video (local on the RTX 5090, 32GB VRAM). Tiered by need: Wan 2.2 I2V — primary, cinematic/best human quality. LTX-Video — fast iteration / previews (~90s/clip). HunyuanVideo — physics-heavy shots (water/cloth/fire). fal.ai (animation-agent) — cloud fallback for scale/burst. Existing scene-director already wraps ComfyUI + LTXV — extend it for Wan 2.2.
wo_quotes.section_s7_quote: Assembly. Cut clips to the existing lyrics via music_video_pipeline/assemble_video.py.
wo_quotes.section_s8_quote: QC gate. Approvals tracked in Supabase (scene #, status, file). Standard: ≥3/4 generations consistent; selective re-render of failures. No chasing 100%.
wo_named_aspirational_labels_in_source: from §S6: "Existing scene-director already wraps ComfyUI + LTXV — extend it for Wan 2.2."
from §S7: "Cut clips to the existing lyrics via music_video_pipeline/assemble_video.py."

pipeline_to_wan22_animate_linkage.method: Two PHASE_STATE.json quotes (under the same session_2026_04_01_mv key) collectively show: (1) the music-video pipeline is muscle_music_video.py with keyframes+animate+stitch modes, and (2) that same session's shot generation used Wan 2.2 i2v two-stage MoE for 19 of the 20 shots. The PHASE_STATE.json quotes do NOT directly state that `--mode animate` is the Wan 2.2 implementation; that linkage is inferred from the two quotes belonging to the same session entry. ANIM-02 should confirm by inspecting muscle_music_video.py source.

shot_pipeline_details_quoted_from_shot_l.scale_rule_quoted: Grog is ALWAYS proportionally oversized vs all objects, props, furniture, people, children. Every shot must include a normal-sized anchor object for scale contrast. No exceptions.
shot_pipeline_details_quoted_from_shot_l.young_grog_rule_quoted: Young Grog = toddler proportions: round oversized head, chubby smooth clean-shaven cheeks, wide innocent warm brown eyes, stubby thick fingers, 4 years old but already twice the height of any full-grown adult.
